creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 157761
Bump net-mgmt/lldpd to 0.7.15, silence build a little

Hi there

This small patch should bump net-mgmt/lldpd to its latest release 0.7.15.

The added doxygen parameter just reduces the noise during build process (I don't think there is much value in having doxygen doc built for normal use)

Looking forward to someone pushing the changes for me

Thanks in advance,
Mathieu
